encryptionRecovery.simpleDescription: Use your device passcode or restore a backup to unlock encrypted messages.

smsConsent.label: I consent to receive SMS notifications and alerts from {{companyName}}. Message frequency may vary. Msg & data rates may apply. Reply <stop>STOP</stop> to unsubscribe at any time. Reply <help>HELP</help> for help.

auth.headline: Kutumira mameseji kwakachengeteka kune chero munhu, chero kupi
auth.description: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, kuturikira mumitauro inodarika 100, mameseji anonyangarika, uye kufona kweizwi/vhidhiyo.

feature.encryption: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo nekukurumidza
feature.translation: Kuturikira kwemameseji kwakanaka uye kwakavakwa mukati
feature.privacy: Kutanga nekuvharidzira. Ruzivo rwako, kutonga kwako.
feature.translate: Kuturikira kwemameseji kwakanaka uye kwakavakwa mukati

hero.line1: Kutumira mameseji kwakachengeteka kune chero munhu, chero kupi — ne
hero.sub: Wana nhamba yefoni yakachengeteka yemahara kuti ufonere uye utumire mameseji pasi rose pamusoro peWi-Fi kana data. Enjaya kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, mameseji anonyangarika, uye kufona kweHD kweizwi/vhidhiyo — nezviridzwa zvakavakwa mukati zvinokubatsira kuti urambe wakabatana nemiganhu.
hero.freeNote: Kufona uye kutumira mameseji kwebasic ndekwemahara. AI yakakwirira uye zvinhu zvakakwirira zvinoda kusimudzira.

feat.encryption: Kuvharidzira kubva kumagumo kusvika kumagumo, nguva dzose
feat.privacy: Kutanga nekuvharidzira. Ruzivo rwako, kutonga kwako.

auth.desktopTip: Uri padhesiki? Vhura nefonhi yako kuti utore app.
auth.scanHelper: Uri padhesiki? Vhura nefonhi yako kuti utore app.
auth.subhead: Kutumira mameseji kwakavanzika, kwakavharidzwa, uye kwakaturikirwa — nekukurumidza.
auth.tip: Zano: Shandisa akaunti imwe chete pawebhu uye nharembozha. Mameseji ako anoramba akabatana.
auth.scanHint: Vhura kuti udhodhe app kana kuvhura mubhurawuza rako.

profile.title: Profile yeMushandisi
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Ratidza mameseji ekutanga pamwe chete nekuturikira
profile.noPrivateKey: Hapana kiyi yakavanzika pamudziyo uyu yekutuma.
profile.setBackupPassword: Seta password kuti uvharidze kiyibheki yako:
profile.importFailed: Yatadza kutumira kiyi (password isina kufanira kana faira rakakanganiswa).
profile.keysRotated: Kiyipairi itsva yakagadzirwa uye kiyipabhuriki yakadhodhwa.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Kiyi yako yakavanzika haiende kunze kwemudziyo uyu. Tumira kopi yakachengetedzwa nepassword kuti uidzorerazve pane mumwe mudziyo.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Uri paFree—shandisa Sun/Moon sarudzo dziri pasi. Simudza kuti uvhure mamwe ma themes.
profile.backupDesc: Chengetedza kiyi yako yekuvharidzira kuti udzorerazve mameseji ako pane mumwe mudziyo zvakachengeteka.
profile.freePlanCopy: Uri papurani yemahara. Simudza kuti uvhure zvinhu zvakawanda sekuchengetedza, nhamba dzimwe, uye sarudzo dzakakwirira dzekuvanzika.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Yatadza kuvhura portal yebilling. Ndapota edza zvakare.
profile.followHint: Nyaya dzavo dzichawonekwa mufidhi yako yeFollowing kana vakatumira nevateveri (kana Ruzhinji).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Chimwe chinhu chakaipa chakaitika muchikamu ichi.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Tumira mafoni uye mameseji anouya kune foni yako yakasimbiswa kana email. Mafoni/text anobuda anogona kuratidza nhamba yako yeChatforia.
profile.errSmsDest: Sarudza kanenge kamwe kune (foni kana email).
profile.errQuietHours: Maawa akanyarara anofanira kuva pakati pe0 ne23.
profile.ageBandHint: Tinongochengeta chikamu chemakore (kwete zuva chairo rekuzvarwa). Izvi zvinoshandiswa kuchengeta pairings dzeRandom Chat dzakakodzera.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Shandisa matching yakavakirwa pamakore muRandom Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Kana yakavhurwa, tinoedza kukubatanidza nevanhu vari muzvikamu zvemakore zvakafanira.
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Vechidiki vanogara vachibatanidzwa chete nevamwe vechidiki. Vakuru havagone kubatanidzwa nevana vechidiki.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Nekuchengetedza, maakaunti ari muzvikamu 13–17 anogona kungobatanidzwa chete nemamwe maakaunti 13–17 muRandom Chat.
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Kana iyi yakavhurwa, Foria anogona kushandisa hurukuro dzako dzekare dzeRandom Chat (chete newe) kuchengeta hurukuro ichienderera. Unogona kuidzima chero nguva.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Siya isina chinhu kuti igare nokusingaperi
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Inoshandiswa kana greeting yako yeaudio isipo.
profile.voicemailNote: Maivoicemails kubva kunhamba dzako dzeChatforia anochengetwa muInbox yako yeVoicemail. Unogona kubatsira transcription uye kutumira mupurani dzinotsigirwa.
profile.portHint: Unoda kuchengeta nhamba yako yazvino? Unogona kuipota muChatforia Wireless.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control translation, smart replies, and ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Send the last few received messages (sanitized) to AI to suggest quick replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: If on, suggestions returned by AI will have flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Chatforia easier to use without relying on sound.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Starts at normal size. Increase if you prefer larger text.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when a call rings.
accessibilitySettings.liveCaptionsDesc: Show real-time captions from the other participant’s audio.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Attach a transcript to audio messages you receive.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts for messages & calls
Show banners and title blink so you don’t miss activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on new messages (when supported)
Trigger device vibration with notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on incoming call
Brief bright flash when a call rings.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store only ciphertext on the server. Disables AI/Translate and moderation previews.
privacySection.strictE2EEEnabled: Strict E2EE enabled. AI/Translate will be disabled.

wireless.description: Tonga purani yako yenharembozha yeChatforia, nhamba, forwarding, uye kupota nhamba.

options.heading: Sarudza kuti unoda kushandisa Chatforia sei
options.subheading: Unogona kuwana nhamba itsva yeChatforia, kana kuunza nhamba yako yazvino kubva kune mumwe mutakuri.
options.portNumber: Pota nhamba yako yazvino muChatforia Wireless

port.heading: Pota nhamba yako yazvino
port.subheading: Fambisa nhamba yako yazvino yefoni kubva kumutakuri wako wezviro wemuChatforia. Ita kuti ruzivo rwunoenderana neakaunti yako yemutakuri chaizvo kuti udzivise kunonoka.

status.heading: Status yekupota
status.subheading: Tarisa status yezvikumbiro zvako zvekupota nhamba.

wireless.exhausted: Data yako yapera. Tenga pack itsva kuti urambe uchishandisa data yenharembozha.
wireless.dashboardIntro: Manage your Chatforia mobile data, phone number, eSIM setup, and plan status.

data.caption: Track your current data usage and remaining balance.

premium.heading: Enda Premium
premium.description: Vhura zvinhu zvine simba & bvisa ads.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: This feature requires a Premium plan.

upgrade.title: Simudza
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Tanga nepurani yedu yemahara ine ads. Enda pasina ads nePlus, kana kuvhura zvinhu zvine simba zvizere nePremium.
upgrade.subtitle: Sarudza purani yeapp, wedzera data packs kune iwe, kana kugoverana data nemhuri yako — zvese kubva panzvimbo imwe.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Tanga nepurani yedu yemahara ine ads. Enda pasina ads nePlus, kana kuvhura zvinhu zvine simba zvizere nePremium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Wedzera data ye eSIM yepasi rose kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda kunyange kana uri kure neWi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Gadzira data pool yakagoverwa yemhuri yako uye tonga kushandiswa kwevose kubva panzvimbo imwe.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Vhura zvinhu zvine simba & bvisa ads.

public.premiumAnnual: Save 30% with annual – continue to login

free.title: Mahara
free.desc: Tanga kutumira mameseji nemahara. Yakanakira kana uri kungoyedza Chatforia.

features.chat: Chat chaiyo-yechokwadi 1:1 uye boka, pamwe nemafoni eizwi uye vhidhiyo
features.media: Govera mifananidzo, mameseji eizwi, uye mavhidhiyo mapfupi
features.ai: AI-yakavakirwa mapinduro akachenjera uye kuturikira kwechokwadi (kushandiswa kwakanaka)
features.disappearing: Mameseji anonyangarika uye kutonga kwekuvanzika kwebasic

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Zvinhu zvese zvakakosha, pasina ads. Yakanakira kutumira mameseji uye kufona zuva nezuva.

features.forwarding: Tumira mafoni uye mameseji kune nhamba yako chaiyo yefoni
features.support: Rubatsiro rwokukurumidza kana chimwe chinhu chakaipa

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Mwedzi Mumwe)
premiumMonthly.desc: Chiitiko chizere cheChatforia: zviridzwa zveAI, kugadzirisa, uye rubatsiro rwokutanga.

features.themes: Vhura ma themes ese e premium mavara uye kugadzirisa app
features.ai: Zviridzwa zveAI zvakangopihwa Premium zvekunyora zvakare, mapinduro akachenjera, uye summaries
features.support: Rubatsiro rwokutanga paunenge uchida rubatsiro rwakanyanya
features.number: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Gore)
premiumAnnual.desc: Chengeta zvakawanda kana uchibhadharwa gore rimwe — kusanganisira ma themes e extra mavara, zviridzwa zveAI, uye rubatsiro rwokutanga.

features.allPremium: Zvinhu zvese muPremium Mwedzi Mumwe — kusanganisira ma themes e extra mavara
features.save25: Chengeta zvingaita 30% kana uchibhadhara mwedzi mumwe
features.bestFor: Yakanakira vashandisi vane simba, vashandi vepasi rose, uye vafambi vakanyanya
features.number: Keep your Chatforia number protected while your plan is active

premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Inobhadharwa pamberi. Kanzura chero nguva. Hapana mari dzakavanzika.

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Zvinhu zvizere, maringi tones, uye zviridzwa zveAI zvine simba.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Chengeta zvakawanda kana uchibhadharwa gore rimwe.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Inobhadharwa pamberi. Kanzura chero nguva. Hapana mari dzakavanzika.

mobile.title: Chatforia Nharembozha (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Wedzera data yepasi rose kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda kunyange pasina Wi-Fi. Mitengo inogadziriswa otomatiki zvichienderana nenyika yako uye mari.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Sarudza data pack yepasi rose kamwe chete kuti Chatforia irambe ichishanda paunenge uchifamba kana kure neWi-Fi.

features.throttle: Kumhanya kunogona kudzika mushure mekushandiswa kwakanyanya

unlimited.title: Unlimited pack
unlimited.bestFor: Best for heavy use where supported.

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs inoda mudziyo unotsigira eSIM uye wakavhurika. Kuwanikwa kunoenderana nemhando yefoni, mutakuri, uye nyika. Kuvharika uye kumhanya kunosiyana nenzvimbo.
disclaimer.fairUse: Inotevera fair-use policy uye miganhu yenzvimbo

compare.title: Enzanisa eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Kushandiswa chaiko kwe data kunoenderana nekuti unoshandisa Chatforia sei (izwi, vhidhiyo, media, uye mamwe maapp pafoni yako).

hero.subcopy: Instant eSIM data for travel, backup connectivity, and staying reachable away from Wi‑Fi.

mobile.choosePackSubtitle: Pick the coverage zone and amount of data that fits your trip or everyday backup needs.

feature.2: One-time data packs with clear pricing
feature.3: Use Chatforia when Wi‑Fi is unavailable

region.globalSubtitle: Best for international travel across multiple regions.

medium.title: Traveler pack

large.title: Power pack

xl.title: XL pack

family.title: Chatforia Mhuri (data yakagoverwa)
family.subtitle: Goverana data pool imwe chete nemhuri yako. Bhiri rimwe, maakaunti akawanda eChatforia, kuvharika kwepasi rose.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Inosanganisira 20 GB yedata inokurumidza yakagoverwa — yakanakira vashandisi 2–3 vepfupi.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Inosanganisira 40 GB yedata inokurumidza yakagoverwa — yakanakira nhengo 3–5 dzinoshanda.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Inosanganisira 80 GB yedata inokurumidza yakagoverwa — yemhuri dzine simba dzinogara dziri online.

feature.fairUse: Inotevera fair-use policy uye miganhu yenzvimbo

family.disclaimer: Mapack eMhuri anogadzira kana kuwedzera data pool yakagoverwa. Unogona kukoka uye kubvisa nhengo chero nguva.
family.footnote: Mapack eMhuri anogoverana data pool imwe chete kune maakaunti eChatforia akabatana. Kuwanikwa uye miganhu kunoenderana nenyika yako uye mitemo yenzvimbo.

why.title: Nei vanhu vachichinja kuChatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia inokupa nhamba chaiyo yefoni, kuturikira kwakachenjera, uye nzira yakajeka yekuenda pasina ads kana uchinge wagadzirira.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Ads akareruka paFree, kusimudzira kwePlus kwakareruka kana uchinge wagadzirira, uye zviridzwa zvePremium zvisipo muTextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: App yemazuva ano, kugadzirwa kwepasi rose kutanga, uye kuturikira kwakavakwa mukati panzvimbo pekuendesa mafoni ekare.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs maapp ekutumira mameseji
messengers.body: Tumira nhamba chaiyo dzefoni — kwete chete vashandisi vemamwe maapp — neAI uye status yakavakwa mukati. Yakanakira kana uri kuuya kubva kumaapp seTextFree kana TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Kuzenzanisa kunobva paruzivo rwunowanikwa pachena uye kunogona kuchinja nekufamba kwenguva. Mamwe maapp ekutumira mameseji emahara seTextFree kana TextMe anowanzo fanana neTextNow.

free.q: Purani yeMahara iri yemahara chaizvo here?
free.a: Hongu. Purani yeMahara inosanganisira nhamba yeChatforia, kufona, uye kutumira mameseji ine ads. Unogona kugara paFree kwenguva dzose, kana kusimudza kuti ubvise ads uye uvhure zvinhu zvakawanda.

plusPremium.q: Musi mutsauko uripo pakati pePlus nePremium?
plusPremium.a: Plus inobvisa ads uye inowedzera nhoroondo yemameseji yako — yakanakira kushandiswa zuva nezuva. Premium inowedzera kugadzirisa kwakawanda, zviridzwa zveAI zvekunyora zvakare uye mapinduro, uye rubatsiro rwokutanga kuvashandisi vane simba.

esim.a: Chatforia Nharembozha inoshandisa kuvharika kwe eSIM yepasi rose. Kuwanikwa kunoenderana nenyika yako uye mudziyo. Uchaona sarudzo dzinotsigirwa panguva yekuvhurwa mukati meapp.

cancel.q: Ndingakwanisa kanzura kana chinja mapurani chero nguva here?
cancel.a: Hongu. Unogona kutonga kana kanzura subscription yako kubva peji yebilling muapp. Shanduko dzinoita kushanda pakupera kwenguva yako yazvino yekubhadhara.

family.a: Mapack eMhuri anogadzira data pool yakagoverwa kune maakaunti akawanda eChatforia. Munhu mumwe anobhadhara bhiri, uye unogona kukoka kana kubvisa nhengo uye kuseta miganhu pamunhu.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria.
randomChat.description: Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: Waiting for them to accept Add Friend…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: Usernames stay hidden until both people choose Add Friend.
randomChat.riaSeparate: Chat with Ria anytime — separate from random human matching.
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat.

account.q: How do I create or recover my account?
account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”.

privacy.a: Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them.

translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata.

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version.

section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message.
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages.
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Go further
section3.item1: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app.
section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.

about.title: Nezve Chatforia
about.description: Chatforia ipuratifomu yemazuva ano yekutaurirana yakagadzirwa kuti ive yakachengeteka uye inotsigira mitauro yakawanda...

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts are optional.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: Encryption yakasimba uye marongero ekuchengetedza anodzorwa nemushandisi
about.controlDesc: Zvinhu zvakaita semameseji anonyangarika uye read receipts

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web.
press.scanTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.

advertise.title: Advertise with Chatforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging users with tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, and house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. You can target Chatforia with publisher ID {{pubId}}, or use the form below for direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—use the form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign and we’ll recommend placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency and dwell time in chat UI
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) available
why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start…

howWeUse.title: How we use information
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection).

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Children
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law).

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure.
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app.

yourContent.title: Your content
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages.

changes.title: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

refund.title: Mutemo weKudzorera Mari
refund.intro: PaChatforia, tinoedza kupa sevhisi yemhando yepamusoro kune vese vashandisi. Mutemo uyu unotsanangura mamiriro anogona kuitwa kudzorwa kwemari.

subscriptions.title: MaSubscription
subscriptions.body: Ma subscription anobhadharwa pamberi uye anoenderera nguva nenguva. Unogona kukanzura chero nguva kuburikidza neaccount yako kana papuratifomu yawakatenga.

eligibility.title: Kukodzera Kudzorerwa Mari
eligibility.body: Mari inogona kudzorerwa kana paine kubhadharwa kaviri, kukanganisa mubhadharo, kana matambudziko ehunyanzvi anokutadzisa kushandisa zvinhu zvakabhadharwa. Zvese zvikumbiro zvinotariswa zvakasiyana.

nonRefundable.title: Zvisingadzorerwi
nonRefundable.body: Kazhinji hatidzorere mari yenguva isina kushandiswa, chikamu che subscription, kana kusakanzura nguva isati yasvika.

thirdParty.title: Kutenga Kuburikidza neVamwe
thirdParty.body: Kana wakatenga kuburikidza nemapuratifomu akaita seApple App Store, unofanirwa kukumbira kudzorerwa mari ikoko.

contact.title: Taura Nesu
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings.

whatWeSend.title: What we send
whatWeSend.body: Chatforia sends only account-related and conversational SMS to phone numbers a user has explicitly provided and consented to. Typical messages include login/verification codes, message delivery alerts, security notices, and transactional account updates.

optIn.title: How users opt in
optIn.body: Users opt in by entering their phone number during registration and checking the SMS consent checkbox on the registration page or the dedicated

optOut.title: How users opt out
optOut.stop: Reply STOP to any Chatforia SMS to opt out.

help.title: Help
help.bodyPrefix: Reply HELP for assistance or email

privacyTerms.title: Privacy & Terms
privacyTerms.bodyStart: By consenting to SMS, users also agree to our
